name: gitlab-mcp
description: Read-only GitLab MCP server for merge request, pipeline, and CI diagnostics workflows.
title: GitLab MCP

tools.name: gitlab_get_server_info
tools.description: Get the GitLab version, minimum supported version, and detected API capabilities.

tools.name: gitlab_get_current_user
tools.description: Get the GitLab user associated with the configured token.

tools.name: gitlab_search_projects
tools.description: Search GitLab projects visible to the token.

tools.name: gitlab_get_project
tools.description: Get a GitLab project by numeric id, path, repository URL, or GitLab web URL.

tools.name: gitlab_list_merge_requests
tools.description: List merge requests for a project, with optional state, branch, author, reviewer, search, and pagination filters.

tools.name: gitlab_get_merge_request
tools.description: Get one merge request by project and MR IID.

tools.name: gitlab_get_merge_request_changes
tools.description: Get changed files and diffs for a merge request.

tools.name: gitlab_get_merge_request_commits
tools.description: Get commits included in a merge request.

tools.name: gitlab_get_merge_request_discussions
tools.description: Get discussion threads and notes for a merge request.

tools.name: gitlab_get_merge_request_pipelines
tools.description: Get pipelines related to a merge request.

tools.name: gitlab_get_pipeline
tools.description: Get one GitLab pipeline by pipeline id or URL.

tools.name: gitlab_list_pipeline_jobs
tools.description: List jobs for a GitLab pipeline by pipeline id or URL.

tools.name: gitlab_get_job_trace
tools.description: Get the redacted tail of a GitLab job trace by job id or URL, optionally truncated by max bytes.

tools.name: gitlab_get_job_trace_tail
tools.description: Get the redacted tail of a GitLab job trace by job id or URL.

tools.name: gitlab_get_job_trace_matches
tools.description: Search the redacted tail of a GitLab job trace and return matching lines with context.

tools.name: gitlab_list_job_artifacts
tools.description: List GitLab job artifact files using server metadata when supported, with a bounded ZIP fallback.

tools.name: gitlab_find_job_artifact_files
tools.description: Find file paths in a GitLab job artifacts ZIP archive by glob or regex.

tools.name: gitlab_get_job_artifact_file
tools.description: Get one text file from a GitLab job artifacts archive by job id or URL, redacted and optionally truncated.

tools.name: gitlab_extract_job_failure_summary
tools.description: Extract a compact Maven/Surefire-aware failure summary from a failed GitLab job trace and bounded reports; full evidence is opt-in.

tools.name: gitlab_analyze_job_surefire_reports
tools.description: Analyze failed Maven test classes selected from the job log and read their bounded Surefire .txt or TEST-*.xml reports for method-level details and likely root causes.

tools.name: gitlab_analyze_failed_pipeline
tools.description: Analyze a root and bounded downstream pipeline graph using GitLab/JUnit reports and Maven, Gradle, Jest, pytest, or generic traces.

tools.name: gitlab_analyze_mr_pipeline_failure
tools.description: Analyze the latest failed merge request pipeline with compact Maven/Surefire root cause, failed tests, cascade grouping, and changed-file correlation. Full context and diffs are opt-in.

secrets.name: gitlab-mcp.personal_access_token
secrets.description: GitLab Personal Access Token with read_api scope.

config.name: gitlab-mcp
config.description: Configure the GitLab instance and read-only access limits.

allowed_projects.description: Optional comma-separated project IDs or paths.

default_per_page.description: Default number of results per page.

max_per_page.description: Maximum permitted number of results per page.

max_jobs.description: Maximum jobs collected across the root and downstream pipeline graph.

max_pipelines.description: Maximum root and downstream pipelines collected per diagnosis.

connect_timeout.description: GitLab HTTP connection timeout as a duration.

read_timeout.description: GitLab HTTP read timeout as a duration.

proxy_url.description: Optional HTTP or HTTPS proxy URL.

max_download_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded for one artifact archive.

retry_attempts.description: Retries for idempotent requests after 429, 502, or 503.

retry_backoff.description: Base retry delay when Retry-After is absent.
